---
name: General Feedback
about: Questions, ideas, or anything that doesn't fit another category
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

## What's on your mind?

Share your question, idea, or feedback here. There's no wrong format — just tell us what you're thinking.


---

## Who are you? (optional)

Knowing your background helps us respond more usefully. For example: tribal IT staff, attorney, developer, researcher, conference attendee, etc. You don't need to share your name or affiliation.


---

## Is there anything specific you'd like us to do with this feedback?

- [ ] Just wanted to share it — no action needed
- [ ] I'd like a response
- [ ] I'm interested in contributing to this project
- [ ] Other (describe below)
